sourceAmbiguity: Promoted drafts might be reopened from a saved-context card.
decisionTaken: PromotedDraftMappedOutcome maps to /portal/requests/REQ-4219 and sets opensDraftForEditing false.
whyThisFitsTheBlueprint: Promotion truth must supersede mutable draft editing.
operationalRisk: Cross-channel receipt parity must consume the same request truth target later.
followUpIfPolicyChanges: Bind to par_201 receipt/status parity once available.
